name: Burryport
scheme: Llanelli Police Station ID code WA900 (Amman Valley Non-Police Station) should be used for Matters starting between 16/11/2023 and 05/12/2024 in the Llanelli Police Station Scheme. The Fixed Fee for the Llanelli Police Station Scheme (4003) is the same as the Fixed Fee for the Amman Valley Police Station Scheme (4001) in this period. Using WA900 for the Llanelli Police Station Scheme in this period will enable correct Fixed Fee to be paid.
